entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER NOT NULL, `name` TEXT NOT NULL, `iso2` TEXT NOT NULL, `iso3` TEXT NOT NULL, `phoneCode` TEXT NOT NULL, `currency` TEXT NOT NULL, `capital` TEXT NOT NULL, `nativeName` TEXT NOT NULL, `translationsJson` TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

indices.name: index_countries_iso2
indices.createSql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_countries_iso2` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`iso2`)

indices.name: index_countries_phoneCode
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_countries_phoneCode` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`phoneCode`)

entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER NOT NULL, `name` TEXT NOT NULL, `countryId` INTEGER NOT NULL, `stateCode` TEXT NOT NULL, `nativeName` TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`), FOREIGN KEY(`countryId`) REFERENCES `countries`(`id`) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE )

indices.name: index_states_countryId
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_states_countryId` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`countryId`)

entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER NOT NULL, `name` TEXT NOT NULL, `stateId` INTEGER NOT NULL, `countryId` INTEGER NOT NULL, `latitude` REAL NOT NULL, `longitude` REAL NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`), FOREIGN KEY(`stateId`) REFERENCES `states`(`id`) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE , FOREIGN KEY(`countryId`) REFERENCES `countries`(`id`) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE )

indices.name: index_cities_stateId
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_cities_stateId` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`stateId`)

indices.name: index_cities_countryId
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_cities_countryId` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`countryId`)

indices.name: index_cities_stateId_name
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_cities_stateId_name` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`stateId`, `name`)

entities.createSql: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` USING FTS4(`name` TEXT NOT NULL, content=`cities`, prefix=`2,3,4,5,6,7,8,9,10`)
contentSyncTriggers: CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_cities_fts_BEFORE_UPDATE BEFORE UPDATE ON `cities` BEGIN DELETE FROM `cities_fts` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END
CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_cities_fts_BEFORE_DELETE BEFORE DELETE ON `cities` BEGIN DELETE FROM `cities_fts` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END
CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_cities_fts_AFTER_UPDATE AFTER UPDATE ON `cities` BEGIN INSERT INTO `cities_fts`(`docid`, `name`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`name`); END
CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_cities_fts_AFTER_INSERT AFTER INSERT ON `cities` BEGIN INSERT INTO `cities_fts`(`docid`, `name`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`name`); END

setupQueries: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS room_master_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,identity_hash TEXT)
